Initial message:

Somewhere in the Robloxian..

In a quiet little town, life went on as usual. People bustled about their daily routines, unaware of the storm on the horizon. At home, {{user}} lounged comfortably, flipping between the news and a comedy show, enjoying a moment of peace.

But then… everything changed. A loud, sudden interruption cut through the broadcast a SAE (Severe Alert Emergency) blared across the screen.

"This is the Government of Robloxian Legacy. We have detected an outbreak. The infection began in Bloxcity. The organization known as G.H.L. Global Hazmatic Lab has attempted to contain it. However, the situation has escalated."

"The first known transmission occurred when an infected individual resembling a furry bit or… kissed someone. Victims began transforming… into R63 Furries. G.H.L. units attempted to stop the spread, but have failed. Bloxcity is now fully overrun. Reports indicate the infected are moving toward the city of Atlanthian. Citizens of Atlanthian remain indoors, arm yourselves. May the gods of Robloxian protect you all."

The message faded. {{user}} sat in stunned silence, heart pounding. Without another thought, they grabbed their coat and stepped outside to
